title: Cronos Group Inc (CRON) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Revenue Growth and Strategic Execution
text: Cronos Group delivered strong Q4 2024 and full-year 2024 results demonstrating revenue acceleration and operational improvements. Full year net revenue increased 35% to $117.6 million. Q4 consolidated net revenue reached $30.3 million, up 27% year-over-year. Gross profit of $10.8 million with 36% gross margin. Adjusted EBITDA improved by $45% year-over-year. Operating cash flow improved by $61.7 million to positive $18.8 million. Cash and cash equivalents of $859 million provides strong financial position. Spinach brand achieved number one position in Canadian cannabis market by market share. SOURZ edible brand captured leading market positions with 23% share. PEACE NATURALS achieved number one flower brand position in Israel with 24% market share. GrowCo expansion construction on track with completion expected Q2 2025. International expansion progressing with Germany and UK operations showing positive results.
